modular-rag.description: Modular RAG MCP Server - Knowledge base search and document management

tools.name: query_knowledge_hub
tools.description: Search the knowledge base for relevant documents using hybrid search (semantic + keyword). Returns formatted results with source citations.

query.description: The search query or question to find relevant documents for.

top_k.description: Maximum number of results to return.

collection.description: Optional collection name to limit the search scope.

tools.name: list_collections
tools.description: List all available document collections in the knowledge base. Returns collection names, document counts, and metadata.

include_stats.description: Whether to include statistics (document count) for each collection.

tools.name: get_document_summary
tools.description: Get summary and metadata for a specific document. Returns title, summary, tags, source path, and chunk count.

doc_id.description: The document ID to retrieve summary for. Can be full doc_id (e.g., 'doc_abc123') or the hash portion.

collection.description: Collection name to search in. If not specified, searches the default collection.
